zh.lifeSummary: 當Gervaise de Saye於1152年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其庫塔恩斯時，她的父親RUELLAN DE SAY22歲，母親PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL17歲。她於1168年與Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1205年9月10日在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gervaise de Saye于1152年出生在法国巴-諾門迪曼其庫塔恩斯时，她的父亲RUELLAN DE SAY22岁，母亲PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL17岁。她于1168年与Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1205年9月10日在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蓋爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

en.lifeSummary: When Gervaise de Saye was born in 1152, in Coutances, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, her father, RUELLAN DE SAY, was 22 and her mother, PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL, was 17. She married Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé in 1168. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 September 1205, in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gervaise de Saye est née en 1152, à Coutances, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, RUELLAN DE SAY, avait 22 ans et sa mère, PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé en 1168. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1205, à Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gervaise de Saye 1152 in Coutances, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater RUELLAN DE SAY 22 und ihre Mutter PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL 17. Sie hat 1168 Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. September 1205 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gervaise de Saye è nata il nel 1152 nel Coutances, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, RUELLAN DE SAY, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé nel 1168. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 settembre 1205, nel Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gervaise de Sayeが1152年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェコウタンセスで生まれた時，父RUELLAN DE SAYは22歳，母PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNILは17歳であった。1168年にGeoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédéと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1205年9月10日にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインガeルで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gervaise de Saye(이)가 1152년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 코우탠스스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 RUELLAN DE SAY(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1168년 Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1205년 9월 10일 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 가e에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gervaise de Saye nasceu em 1152, em Coutances, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, RUELLAN DE SAY, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé em 1168. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1205, em Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gervaise de Saye родилась в 1152 г. в местности коутансесь, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени RUELLAN DE SAY было 22 года, а матери, которую звали PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé в 1168 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 сентября 1205 г. в местности гаeл, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gervaise de Saye nació en 1152, en Coutances, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, RUELLAN DE SAY, tenía 22 años y su mamá, PETRONILLE DE GRENTENTEMESNIL, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Geoffroy I de Montfort-le-Hédé en 1168. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1205, en Gaël, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
